content: Always worked fine but as others say, it now no longer lets you login. You have to reinstall the app to do it every time. Fix it.
keeps crashing
good ,easy app to use👍👍👍
The app logs me out and then won't let me log back in. Constantly having to uninstall and reinstall the app for it to log me in once and then the same issue persists.
This is my second go round of deleting and reinstalling. Judging by the reviews you guys have a problem to fix pronto. Electrical supply is a bit of a necessity, you can't mess around like this.
app just not working! cant log in or scan fingerprint, nothing happens!
satisfactory

I can't log in via app or website. I get a notification saying I'm being sent an email with a verification code, but I never receive the email so can't check or change tariff, can't view my account balance and can't submit meter readings
What are they doing? Have to delete and reinstall the app every time I try to log in now. Absolutely ridiculous.
not managed to get to enter my meter readings yet
Havent been able to log in for over a week. They will not give a time frame of when it will be fixed. Worked fine before the update will be changing suppliers would not reccomend.
best

forced onto a smart meter due to having electric heaters and boiler. 9 months back and forth trying to get usage data to work on app or web. pathetic company to deal with if u have problems. pathetic customer service that promised it would get fixed soon and then all the script apologies when they admitted the app won't work for my setup!. totally inaccurate HID Info for my tariff. they say there getting my info from smart meter but I have to give them readings manually to get a bill!

good

I called them and got a recorded message, it then disconnected. what a disgrace

Luckily for some reason my husband was able to still log in on his phone so we were able to top up for now. Not looking forward to calling customer services tbh as takes ages to get through and not normally helpful unfortunately. EDIT 4 days later and ive just had to uninstall the app again as I can't log in, getting annoying now as Im a top up customer.

This must be the first app I've ever had to deal with. first, I got logged out and couldn't log in, and then I finally logged in. it updated and logged me out, and I couldn't log in. it keeps giving me an error message that something is wrong. Try later. I cleared data and catch and started again, and then it said the device was authenticated. I tried to log in again, and it was the same issue over and over. some of the emsil links are giving error messages as either expired or used already.

Update: eventually logged in, after clearing cache, re-installing app and endlessly going round in circles with authentication codes and error messages. Update 31/03/2026: another app update, and back to square one with logging in again 😟
